insight: There appears to be a bug where the 'But How?' achievement (lose to Pacifist Bot) does not trigger correctly in some circumstances. Multiple failed attempts were recorded; the player suspected the non-English game localization may have interfered, though mrguy888 noted a prior similar bug report existed. Replay codes for failed attempts and one successful attempt were provided.
author: cachotognax
context: cachotognax attempted to get the 'But How?' achievement against Pacifist Bot and failed multiple times before succeeding after switching to English language, suspecting a localization bug.
